target_flow: Send and read messages in ChatGPT desktop app

navigation_plan.note: Bring window to front without resizing
EXACTLY ONE Tab — focuses the input field. Do NOT repeat.
Sends full string instantly via SendKeys
Verify text appeared in input before sending
Wait for AI to finish responding
Ctrl+A+C returns full conversation text including response

known_issues: Multiple processes share chatgpt.exe — UAB auto-selects the one with a window title
Second Tab press opens attachment menu — never press Tab more than once
SendKeys works for typing (spaces preserved) via Tab focus method
Ctrl+A in Grok selects nothing but works in ChatGPT — use /copy endpoint
